settings.title: LEGION OF LIONS  ·  $97 / MO  ·  $997 / YR  ·  UNLIMITED SEATS

settings.editor: A movement of self-mastery for heart-driven leaders. Train the body, the food, the mind — alongside lions who refuse to live like fearful lambs. Where the mind goes, the body follows.
Periodized programming — strength, conditioning, mobility — updated weekly. Train at home, in a hotel, in any gym.
Macros, recipes, supplement guides. Real food. No fads. Energy you can feel by day three.
Weekly mental conditioning — identity, focus, courage. The ceiling Billy puts on you is the ceiling you've been waiting for.
The shortest path into the work. A 3-page blueprint — Three Pillars, the daily standard, the seven-day challenge. Every $7 funds ~28 meals through our charity partners.

icon_list.text: Page 1: The Lion vs Lamb thesis
Page 2: The Three Pillars in plain English

“The Legion isn't another fitness program.
